I had a great experience with the Barnwell Law Group. I was guided through an emotional divorce with grace and clarity; efficient and always responsive which gave me peace of mind at every step of the process, all at an affordable price. Divorce resolved absent a contested process which greatly benefited myself and ex-spouse financially as well as emotionally.

I am incredibly grateful for Cory’s help and representation. I initially had a judgment entered against me due to improper responses while I was unrepresented. I was not given a court date, and the ruling was made in favor of the other party, which put me at a serious disadvantage.

Cory successfully helped me get a judgment reversed in Superior Court. With very little time left, he agreed to take my case as a last-minute hire and acted quickly and effectively.

From day one, Cory was attentive, responsive, and professional. He took the time to fully understand my situation, recognized the urgency, and acted quickly.

Cory is extremely knowledgeable and explained everything clearly, making sure I understood the process and my options. Despite the time constraints, he worked diligently and successfully got the judgment reversed, giving me a fair opportunity that I was previously denied.

His fees were reasonable, especially considering the level of dedication, skill, and urgency he brought to my case. Throughout my case, Cory demonstrated strong attention to detail, responsiveness, and a clear understanding of the urgency involved.

I highly recommend Cory to anyone who needs strong legal representation, especially if time is critical. I am very appreciative of everything he did for me!!

I’ve had the pleasure of working with Cory Barnwell at Barnwell Law Group on several legal matters for my company and personal.  Cory was professional, knowledgeable, and approachable throughout the entire process.  He consistently responded to emails and phone calls promptly, making communication smooth and stress free.  His expertise and guidance were invaluable, and he achieved excellent results in resolving each of my legal issues.  I highly recommend Cory and the Barnwell Law group to any business or individual in need of trusted legal support.

reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately, the anonymity of your review makes it difficult for me to address what may have lead to your dissatisfaction. It's never too late to have that discussion, so please feel free to reach out to me at your convenience.

reviews.text: Cory was fantastic. The company I was dealing with was refusing pay despite not having a good argument as to why they should not pay me. Cory wrote them a very well-thought out letter that they couldn't refute, and after a few phone calls, they caved and agreed to pay me. The company was not taking me seriously until Cory got involved and they very quickly changed their tune after that.
Easy to work with. Settled my case with no delay.

Cory Barnwell was attentive and very thorough while also providing all my available options in my situation. I would highly recommend him and this practice to represent you and protect your business. Thank you and I will use them again in the future!

I contacted Cory to resolve an outstanding balance on a client account. Prior to hiring Cory, I had pursued payment for over 5 months with no success. Within 10 business days, Cory had written a demand, sent it the the client, and the client agreed to pay the total balance owed. Hiring the Barnwell Law Group was the best decision! The fees were reasonable. The communication was clear. I will return to Cory for all my future cases!

Anyone looking for quick and easy resolution, contact Cory Barnwell at Barnwell Law Group!

Google reviews. Maybe they represented reviewers in uncontested divorces. I don’t know. What I do know is: if you're considering this firm for anything remotely contentious for a divorce—run like you’ve got to hit a 4.5 forty to survive.

It started with the usual spiel: uncontested divorces run around $2K, contested could be up to $5K. I aimed for uncontested until that option fell apart. I notified Jeffrey Darling—my original attorney—and we pivoted to contested.

Then the billing went off the rails.

That first $2K? Gone in what felt like 15 minutes. I wasn’t consulted, updated, or even made aware of filings. I had to call just to understand how billing worked—nothing was uploaded to MyCase. The communication? Basically nonexistent. I wasn’t even sure work had begun. Then I was told I needed to drop another $5K.

Now remember—during my consult, Jeffrey said if things went from uncontested to contested, I’d just pay the difference: $3K. Not another full $5K. And that new $5K? Also burned through fast. So if they say contested divorces cost under $5K, don’t believe it. Budget for way more.

It gets better. (Note the sarcasm.)

Jeffrey also told me my VA income was off-limits in Georgia divorces. He even smirked and said I’d be the one getting paid since my ex earned more. Except… that’s not true. VA income is included in Georgia and can absolutely be used against you in calculating support. How does a divorce attorney not know this? That’s like a football coach not knowing what offsides is.

My girlfriend, a paralegal, repeatedly pointed out filings and court actions I was never told about. She’d catch things I should’ve known—and once again, the firm never told me a thing. Horrendous communication could be their motto.

When I finally met with Jeffrey to talk strategy, he constantly cut me off, got visibly annoyed, and treated my input like a nuisance. Their communication style? “We don’t.” And if you ask? They still won’t. I explicitly told them how important communication was—didn’t matter.

Then comes the “representation.” Or lack of it. Neither Jeffrey nor the new attorney, Matthew Michaud, seemed remotely interested in fighting for me. I get it—I’m not paying for a friend. But I am paying for someone to advocate. Instead, I got silence, dismissal, and somehow ended up paying my ex monthly—despite 50/50 custody. Multiple other attorneys literally laughed when I told them that.

When I raised my concerns, Matthew responded with an email so smug and condescending it bordered on parody. He minimized my accomplishments like they were distractions. I still have that email by the way.

They burned through my retainer faster than a toddler through Halloween candy, then acted shocked when I questioned how $5K turned into $7K—and rising.

Maybe I just got unlucky. Maybe the rest of the team is better. But from where I’m sitting, it never felt like I had lawyers fighting for me.

So yeah—be careful. Their communication is somewhere between “bad” and “imaginary.” Their billing? Absolutely turbocharged. And if you’re not careful, they’ll find a way to charge you for breathing too close to their office.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I'm really sorry to read this. I never want anyone to walk away from working with our firm feeling disappointed or unheard. Going through a divorce is already hard enough, and the last thing you should feel is ignored or confused about what's going on.
I know communication and clarity matter, and if you felt like those were missing, that's something I take seriously. "Dependability of Communication" is one of our five core values we aspire to. I also understand how important trust is in this kind of relationship. I genuinely regret falling short of that.
Because we have to protect your privacy, I can't speak to the details here, but if you're open to it, I'd like the chance to talk things through directly. We’re always trying to improve, and your feedback helps us do that.
I wish you the best in whatever comes next.

Part 2: LaGrone Law Continues to Deliver

The Lagrone Law Firm went above and beyond in assisting my husband with his I-485 USCIS application. From the very first consultation to the final approval notice, their team demonstrated unmatched professionalism, deep expertise, and genuine care for the client’s well-being.

They took the time to explain every step of the process in clear, compassionate terms—always responsive, thorough, and proactive in anticipating USCIS requirements. Their attention to detail and strong advocacy made what could have been a stressful journey feel organized and hopeful.

Thanks to their diligent efforts, my was approved with no delays or complications (a 27 minute interview). We highly recommend The Lagrone Law Firm to anyone seeking trustworthy, knowledgeable, and heart-centered immigration legal services. They truly fight for their clients as if they were family.

Title: Exceptional Legal Services: LaGrone Law Delivers Professionalism with Speed

I recently had the pleasure of working with LaGrone Law on an immigration matter, and I am delighted to share my positive experience with this outstanding firm. From start to finish, their professionalism, attention to detail, organizational prowess, and accessibility to team members have truly set them apart.

One of the most commendable aspects of LaGrone Law is their unwavering commitment to professionalism. From the initial consultation to the resolution of the matter, every interaction with their team exuded a prominent level of expertise and integrity. The attorneys at LaGrone Law were not only knowledgeable in their field but also demonstrated a genuine concern for my case, ensuring that I felt supported and informed throughout the process.

LaGrone Law's meticulous attention to detail was evident in every aspect of my experience. They left no stone unturned, thoroughly examining all aspects of my case to provide comprehensive and well-informed advice. This meticulous approach not only instilled confidence in their abilities but also displayed their dedication to achieving the best possible outcome for their clients.

The organization at LaGrone Law is hugely impressive. Timelines were established and adhered to, and communication was consistently clear and transparent. This level of organization streamlined the entire legal process and showed a commitment to efficiency and client satisfaction.

What truly set LaGrone Law apart for me was the easy accessibility to team members. Communication channels were open, and my questions and concerns were addressed promptly. The team's responsiveness created a collaborative and supportive atmosphere, which significantly eased the stress associated with legal proceedings.

Lastly, I am immensely grateful for the speed at which my application was approved. LaGrone Law demonstrated a sense of urgency without compromising the quality of their work. This efficiency not only saved time but also highlighted their dedication to expeditiously resolving legal matters for their clients.

In conclusion, my experience with LaGrone Law was nothing short of excellent. Their professionalism, attention to detail, organizational skills, and easy accessibility to team members make them a standout choice for anyone seeking legal representation. I wholeheartedly recommend LaGrone Law to anyone in need of legal services, and I am grateful for the positive impact they had on my case.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Lee-

I am disappointed to read this review, and always eager to address client concerns. My cell phone is (404) 797-1717. All my clients receive it, and all can contact me directly.

I have a starkly different recollection of events, as does staff privy to the call on speakerphone. For those reading this review, all work was completed on this case in 2015, resulting in a successful outcome, wherein the reviewer was awarded primary custody of her children in a contested custody matter. She contacted us one early evening this past summer to write a letter, and then began calling nearly every hour, starting in the early hours of the following morning. (As the review reflects, these events took place over the course of one evening and the following morning, so our firm imposed no delay upon her response time.) By the time I got to my office that morning, I pulled her old file and noticed she had not paid her previous bill, which had not been mailed to a dead address, but had been sent to her e-mail and furnished to her with her final court order at the time her case was resolved. This balance had been ignored for over four years. While we are happy to assist former clients as a courtesy for a letter where it may be helpful, we cannot help those who, despite a successful outcome in their case, elect not to pay their bills. I informed the former client of this policy. The reviewer describes us saying, “We are not collections attorneys.” For clarification, when she asked why we didn’t keep pursuing the bill, we told her that we do not refer our accounts receivable to collection agencies, because we don’t want to harm our client’s credit.

When we declined to help, the reviewer was upset, but informed us that a well-respected lawyer and former judge, known to our firm, would help her, and we wished her well. I continue to wish this client well. I would point readers to our other reviews, as I believe they better reflect the client experience we strive for and deliver as a team each day.

Naturalization process was very stressful for me. I passed civic, writing and reading tests, but the USCIS officer told me that I failed the "understanding English" test.

To tell the truth, my English is not perfect. Moreover, the officer spoke with me very fast and she began to get nervous because I asked her to speak slowly and use more simple words. So, when I failed my citizenship exam I was not happy, but I din't give up my dream of U.S. citizenship. I started looking for a professional lawyer for my second citizenship interview.

I personally believe that Gambini Law is undoubtedly the best immigration law firm in Georgia. I confirm this through personal experience as I have previously utilized other immigration firms for my law needs and their service fell well short what Olga Gambini has been able to deliver.

I cannot thank Olga Gambini enough for securing U.S. citizenship. I’d recommend her for any immigration law needs, thanks so much!!!

reviews.text: Worst closing I've ever had.  Buyer never given details to wire funds until day of closing.  Real Estate Agent was never told of closing time nor was I.  I had to call to get the closing time.  The closing statement left off the agent commission so that had to be corrected.  So buyer funds were delayed and then when they got the buyer funds - 3 days later, i was told agent never sent earnest money so I had to wait for that to happen.

If you could mess up any part of a closing, they did. Every part of our closing with them went poorly from start to finish. We received closing documents at ten minutes before closing time on the business day before our closing and they were incorrect. We spent an hour waiting for correct numbers at the table. Wire transfers were requested 10+ times and one still didn't make it on that business day. They pushed the closing and made us wait a weekend for a new closing date and time. This closing office was about as slow and unprofessional as they come. I highly recommend choosing another closing attorney.

Could close the same day because of them. made some changes with the numbers at the closing table which we didn't hear from them before and we had no options to get the numbers work for us at that moment. Never replied or read the emails carefully from us or from the lender. Charges high and poor service. I guess they take more responsibility than they are capable of. My agent chose them abut I won't recommend.

DO NOT USE THIS TITLE COMPANY! The numbers were not right twice! I closed in June. Reached out in August about not receiving my deed. I was told due to COVID give it a few more weeks. Bob's personality puts you at ease from the very start he his calm and as others have noted somewhat of a therapist during the process. 5 stars is not enough Bob truly did an excellent job representing me. Do not hesitate to call him.

Mr. Giannini is a phenomenal person inside and out, and an even better lawyer. He’s concise, knowledgeable, and compassionate. His presence and input is extremely comforting in times of legal stress, and he is easy to get in contact with if there are any lingering concerns. Not to mention the secretaries at his law office are extremely personable and wonderful to speak with. If you’re ever in need, don’t hesitate to contact this office. Words don’t do them enough justice.

I would like to start off by saying Mr. Giannini is a true advocate for anyone in need of a defense attorney and his paralegal, Mary, is an angel.
After being arrested last year, I called the most expensive lawyer in Gwinnett County. I gave a brief description of my circumstances and explained I could not afford to retain their services but if they would refer me to the lawyer they would retain if they were in my situation, I would be grateful. They referred me to Mr. Giannini and he did not disappoint. His office is conveniently located in downtown Lawrenceville, and not only did Mr. Giannini and Mary speak with me multiple times the day I contacted them, they met with me in person for over an hour less than 48 hours of retaining their services (which were very affordable!) They made sure they had all of the facts of my case, were extremely professional in explaining each step of the process and the potential outcomes, and cared about the impact a conviction would have on my personal and professional life.
In the end, Mr. Giannini had my charges were dismissed! While I can't assure he will do the same for you, I can say that Mr. Giannini will do everything in his power to get the best possible outcome for his clients.
The final thought I want to share is on the day of my court appearance, Mr. Giannini was only one of two lawyers out of 10 - 12 that sat with his client instead of in a separate section. That spoke volumes to me. I was a human and not a case. I will never be able to express my gratitude to Mr. Giannini or Mrs. Mary for seeing me through a difficult time in my life, but I will say again, THANK YOU!
reviews.ownerResponse: Jennifer,  thank you for the kind words.

reviews.text:
I strongly advise anyone—especially people of color—to think twice before hiring Tracy Drake. Our experience was deeply disappointing and felt exploitative.

We paid the full retainer, expecting fair and competent representation for a loved one facing serious charges. From the start, communication was nearly nonexistent. Tracy claimed that my loved one wanted to take the case to trial—only for us to find out he had never even spoken to her. That was the first red flag in a troubling pattern.

She never visited him, wouldn’t return calls or emails, and every time he tried to contact the office, someone named Victoria would rudely hang up on him. Tracy even went to court without letting the defendant appear, which left us completely in the dark.

What’s worse, she seemed more aligned with the prosecution than with her own client, pushing for payment while providing substandard, neglectful representation. Eventually, she withdrew as counsel after doing very little to help his case. It felt like we were used for money and left defenseless.

She might show up for other clients, but based on our experience, there was no real advocacy, no respect, and no justice. A truly disappointing and disheartening experience from someone who is supposed to defend people’s rights.
reviews.ownerResponse: Our clientele is very diverse across all races and socioeconomic statuses. We do not discriminate based upon race, sexual orientation or anything about a person. Furthermore,  we are very sorry that you feel like you have had a bad experience. Mrs. Drake attends all court hearings when she is told. If she did not appear, the judge's office would be calling us if she just wasn't showing up, however, sometimes due to conflicts and the rules of court procedure and trial commitments she may not make it to a particular hearing. If you would like to reach out and give us your number we can have Mrs. Drake call you to clarify any questions or concerns that you may have at your convenience.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the incredible assistance I received from Sally’s Law Office during one of the most difficult times in my life. When a loved one was in hospice care, I was overwhelmed by the emotional and logistical challenges. A dear friend recommended Sally's office, and from the very first consultation, I felt I was in the best hands.

Sally and her team quickly earned my trust by listening carefully to my situation and providing clear guidance every step of the way. They efficiently helped me with a deed transfer and setting up a durable Power of Attorney (POA), which allowed me to make important decisions on behalf of my loved one. Thanks to their expert knowledge, I was able to handle the legal matters I needed without unnecessary stress.

Not only did Sally’s office guide me through these vital processes, but they also helped me avoid expensive and time-consuming alternatives like probate, guardianship, and other drawn-out legal procedures. Their professionalism and thoroughness ensured that everything was handled quickly and without any additional burden on my family.

I wholeheartedly recommend Sally’s Law Office to anyone in need of legal assistance. Their compassionate and expert approach made a tremendously difficult time just a little bit easier. I truly couldn't have navigated this without them.

I sent her the info and payment that she asked for and I sent her a message confirming of what I sent her, she only answered with “it’s okay.” A week passed and no word what so ever from her. So I sent her a message to see what’s going on, and she tells me she didn’t receive the email of what I needed to be translated 😒.. so I asked why she didn’t tell me this a week ago I need this paper, she said that I didn’t confirm what I sent, so I sent her proof and she sent me hers, for all I know she could have deleted the email, but on my side it shows both emails being sent!!!!! It really feels great to no longer have immigration problems and not be worried that something might happen to me someday or that I won't be able to see my family. reviews.text:
I can't recommend Steve Reilly highly enough. He stepped in and picked up my divorce case seamlessly just over a month before the court date—a situation that could have been incredibly stressful, but Steve made it manageable and clear from day one.

He took the time to thoroughly explain the legal process, making sure I understood not only the law but also how it applied in the context of my specific situation. What really stood out was how he combined legal expertise with practical experience from similar cases, offering thoughtful advice that helped me make informed decisions.

Thanks to his skillful negotiation and strategic approach, we were able to reach a fair settlement without ever needing to argue in court. Throughout the entire process, Steve was prompt, professional, and incredibly thorough. I’m deeply grateful for his support and highly recommend him to anyone going through a divorce.

Review for Hillary Cranford (Former Trustee)

My experience with Hillary Cranford as trustee of my settlement trust was overwhelmingly negative. She failed to send regular account statements, neglected to file taxes on time, and invested over 75% of the trust into stocks without ever consulting me or asking how I felt about it. I was left in the dark about crucial decisions involving my own money.

Worse, it wasn’t just Hillary—her entire team, including her lawyers and financial advisors (Advocacy Wealth Management), acted with the same lack of transparency and accountability. In my opinion, the way they handled my trust felt more like a scam than a professional fiduciary relationship.

If you're considering working with Hillary or anyone connected to her, I strongly urge you to be extremely cautious. I wouldn't wish this experience on any one.

Paul Andrew is more than an incredible and zealous attorney, I have never met any attorney like him. We had a mutual client in a very upsetting civil/criminal matter where Paul's civil case required presentation of more evidence than the prosecutor ever cared to explore, let alone, than the claimant was willing to present. Once he saw that I was helping his client in the criminal matter, he immediately called me and wanted to speak about the case. We worked on this case for an entire year. He educated me on so many civil matters that ultimately led to the dismissal of the criminal case against our mutual client. If I needed help, he was there every time and able to educate. He met with me and the prosecutor two times until we convinced them to let a bad case go. I was torn between if I could use him as an expert in future cases regarding anything related to property law, major civil suits and so on. I have made referrals to him many times when a client is looking for help in anything property related or in need of an incredible education and evaluation of a very detailed case. I have never seen any attorney dealing in civil suits want to help a criminal defense attorney for a mutual client. This goes to show you that he will not quit, he knows how civil matters can go wrong and just how to fix them, and he will fight until the very end for the very best outcome. I sincerely hope I find him on future matters as his years of experience and firm grip on the law  have changed yet another person's life for the better and proved their innocence. Anyone who hires him as their counsel will be more than pleased, and comforted by his counsel.

reviews.ownerResponse:
At PF Consulting Firm, we take integrity and client satisfaction very seriously. Unfortunately, this review is not from a real customer and contains false, misleading claims.

We were recently approached by a third-party spam company offering to post fake positive reviews for us. After we refused their unethical offer, they began retaliating by posting identical fake negative reviews across all four of our locations.

I have  been going thru a awful divorce, for 11 months I had to endure this painful procedure. But my lawyer Regina I. Edwards took my case & my hand and showed me we can & will get thru this. My Ex was playing catch me if you can hiding her finances  & bank accounts. She thought she was smarter than Regina,  but Regina exposed her , when she said she only had 2 bank accounts.  Come to find out she over 10 bank accounts. Then she tried to hide her financial income documents for 9 months,  so that she kept prolonging my divorce hoping that Regina would drop me as a client since I was on ssi. She tried her best to take my Home that I paid cash for, and she didn't put one dime in it. Im gonna keep it a 100% with anyone reading my review, Regina is not gonna stay on the phone with you, and she's not gonna to baby you. When she needs your documents you better get them to her so she can help you win your case. You got to understand Regina is not your friend, but when I met her in person she a warm human being,  but on the flip side she's a Bull dog with outstanding knowledge of the divorce game. With Regina i. Edwards I hit the trifrecta. I got to keep my House, got my Ex to pay my legal fees,  & give me money for my expenses.  My Ex knew she had my Home in her pocket,  but Regina Edwards saved my Home & my life. I swear you will never find a better lawyer,  thanks to her I can wake up every morning with a smile on my face knowing I have a place to rest my Head. Thank you again Regina Edwards  & Krista!!!

reviews.text:
I really hate to do this but they didn't do anything to deserve a decent review. They say support black businesses, everytime I try, I get the short end of the stick.

So I called a few weeks ago for a consultation about getting a divorce. I detailed the situation to the intake person, who's suppose to pass along the info to the lawyer. To make a long story short, this lawyer person told me that she can not help me. When I asked why she can't take my case, the lawyer lady said & I quote, "my case is to complicated" & it doesn't allowed them to take on cases loads like this.

When I say I'm was left dumbfounded but that response, I still don't know how to process that information. I'm sure there are simple divorces out there, but how many do you actually see or hear about. Most divorces are messy or in her words complicated.

I honestly feel like these people didn't want to help a man get a divorce from a woman. I feel like they discriminate against my gender. I feel like no one at that firm even thought for a second that I'm in pain over not being able to see my kids. No one thinks that a man suffers, but we do.

I less than 2 hours from the time I called to end where i was rejected, no one asked me anything except the basics of what to pass to the lawyer. Name, number, email, the basics of my reason for calling. A few other details were shared, but not enough to tell me, my divorce is to complicated for a firm to take on.

As I said, I feel discriminated against. Not one person took the time to treat this matter serious & it's becuase I'm a man, let alone a black man. Ohhh they also kept asking me, "how am I going to make the payment" I asked for a explanation to why you're asking me about payment & my case isn't even being taken seriously. They said they need to know in case, so I explained to them. I have a job, I have a credit card, what more do I need to say..

Needless to say, I never received a "free consultation" I was immediately shut down & turned away & this is why I say supporting black businesses is so hard. It's people like this Regina lady whoakes hard to want to support black businesses. It's OK, it's not she cares.

I'll gladly go give my business to the white law firm. They at least pretend to care enough to take the case. I would've known better than to try to hire a black woman for a divorce & I'm divorcing a black woman. She wasn't never going to be on my side.

After almost 30 years of marriage, I looked for a divorce lawyer at 58.
The life I carefully and prayerfully crafted for my family was unraveling; I was heartbroken, stupefied, and befuddled. It all started when my husband of three decades took a jaunt out of the country to cheat on me with a former girlfriend.

After years of financial and emotional abuse, gaslighting, and total subjugation, it seemed impossible to attain my freedom. I was a stay-at-home mom with no real income, entirely reliant on my ex-husband. I needed an attorney who would fight for me because I lost my will to fight along with my voice.

Ms. Edwards offered me a free 20-minute zoom session with her to ask questions and express my concerns. She assured me that she would have my back to the end.

My divorce became final ten months later. I got everything I wanted in the settlement, including the house, car, alimony support and he paid my lawyer fees!
I cannot thank Ms. Edwards and her team enough; they are dynamic and get the job done! Call them; you will not regret it.

I head up a divorce and family law roadshow in Massachusetts, and if any of my clients get into legal shenanigans in Georgia, there's only one superhero to call: Sharon. She's the wonder woman of Atlanta law, whipping up wins faster than you can say "objection!"

Her team? Think of them like the Avengers of legal advice. They’re smart, friendly, and they’ve got a knack for translating lawyer-speak into something that sounds like conversational English. It's like watching a telenovela—you get the drama, but you know what's happening.

What's more, Sharon's game plan is as sharp as her coffee is strong. She treats every case like an epic chess match, and trust me, you want her making the moves. She’s got integrity and brains for days.

If you’re in Massachusetts and your legal battles cross Georgia state lines, I’ll send you flying into Sharon's very capable arms. Thanks, Sharon, for being the beacon of justice with a side of Southern Charm!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for this incredible review! 🌟 Your words mean the world to me and to our team here in Georgia. We truly believe in fighting for our clients with both skill and heart, and it’s such a joy to know that comes through. I love your superhero analogy—it perfectly captures the way we see our role: hard working legal advocates fighting to protect our clients and guiding them through some of life’s toughest battles.
We’re grateful for the trust and confidence you show in referring clients our way, and we’ll always strive to deliver the highest level of service with compassion and clarity.

reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and did a great job for me

Mr. Hogan took my case after being denied 2x.  He represented me all the way to my federal appeal and we won the case. His brief was extremely detailed with examples, case references and doctors opinions supporting the fact. I never gave up on what I knew was right for me and he never gave up on me or my doctors.

“You are the light of the world”;
“You are the salt of the earth”;
“Mourn with those who mourn.”
If you seek a lawyer who, as the Bible says, is like light and salt—illuminating darkness and bringing reconciliation to all parties—then Lyle K. Porter is the one you need.
After two incompetent attorneys handled my divorce case, I lost custody of my two children. Although the judge ruled I deserved the majority of my property rights, my former attorney failed to complete the court order even a week after the hearing. I had to terminate her contract, leaving me with just one week until the property closing. My anxiety was overwhelming.
Thankfully, through a referral from Beverly R. Hart, a highly reputable real estate agent in Atlanta, I connected with Attorney Lyle K. Porter. After reviewing my documents and conducting a thorough phone consultation, he drafted and submitted the court order that very afternoon. The judge approved it the next day.
Over the following days, Mr. Porter maintained close communication with the closing attorney and opposing counsel, ensuring my property transfer was completed smoothly on the closing date. I successfully received the funds I was entitled to.
Mr. Porter not only possesses exceptional legal expertise but also genuinely cares about his clients. I am profoundly grateful for his assistance. If you require legal services in family law or criminal law, trust me—Mr. Lyle K. Porter is the best choice.

When I was searching for an attorney for my husband and his very complex situation I pray everyday for God to put the right attorney in our path. About a week later I was having dinner with my sister in law and she gave me a paper with Lyle’s name and number on it and said that he came highly recommend. I felt a little defeated at that point because I had talked to so many and knew none of them were right. The next morning I called Lyle and knew immediately that he was the right one. A year and a half later and everything is finally settled and just like I knew Lyle achieved the impossible. The whole time working with Lyle we weren’t just another case, we were real people and he cared about the outcome because he cared about us. As a wife dealing with her husband being incarcerated I can promise you I was a whole pain in the butt and pestered the hell out of him as the fate of my husband was largely in his hands, he was my husband’s voice and I needed to make sure he was heard. He never once complained or made me feel like a burden and that was huge in itself. I know my whole family will forever be grateful and fully recommend using him for any of your legal needs.

Lyle Porter is hands down the best in the business! His expertise, professionalism, and dedication to my case were top-notch! He took the time to understand my needs, explained everything clearly, and fought tirelessly to achieve the best possible outcome! His communication was prompt and transparent, and I always felt informed and supported throughout the process. I highly recommend Lyle Porter to anyone in need of a skilled and compassionate attorney. Five stars isn't enough – I'd give them ten stars if I could!
Lyle is a straight shooter, no BS highly recommend!
Lyle Porter was spectacular. He was knowledgeable, helpful & honest. I would recommend him to anyone!

Would highly recommend.

Professional,  knowledgeable, dedicated and patient. He is simply brilliant.

reviews.text: I’m incredibly grateful for the work Efstration Law Firm has done in handling my mother's and my case. I highly recommend Efstration Law Firm for anyone seeking reliable and effective legal representation!
Chuck and his team are diligent workers. They work in a professional manner while providing a caring family like environment. I highly recommend his legal services. You won’t regret it.

When I first met Chuck Efstration, I was just going to have a consultation. But after 10 minutes, I knew that he was the one that I wanted to help me through the difficult process of divorce. He is knowledgeable,  always prepared, and seeks the truth.  I found him to be kind and calm which helped to ease my fears. He and his entire staff answered all of my questions with patience. Chuck is a man of character who sought the truth and worked to get the best outcome for me. I knew that he was on my side and was fighting for me. I knew that I could trust him and his entire office. He demonstrated that he cared and truly wanted to help. I am thankful for how he helped me. I would highly recommend him for your legal needs.

Excellent team! Excellent work!! Attorney Chuck and Jessica C are informed, attentive, capable, and deliver favorable results through a no nonsense type of approach. I could not recommend The Efstration Law Firm more.

Chuck and his team were excellent!  Their professionalism and responsiveness were welcomed and appreciated during a challenging time.  I highly recommend The Efstration Law Firm!

Chuck Efstration and The Efstration Law Firm represented me in my contested and extremely contentious divorce and child custody case throughout most of 2023.

I’m not ashamed to say that my case was very complex - for reasons that I choose not to share. Generally speaking, I was blindsided with divorce papers from my husband in early January. In addition to that, subsequent actions and financial decisions made a bad situation even worse for the kids and me. My situation was desperate - I was trying to protect my children and get them out of an extremely toxic environment all while trying not to break down in front of them.

I am so thankful that Chuck was able to take on my case. Within a week of retaining him, he had secured an emergency hearing to address the aforementioned issues among other things. He was well-prepared and brilliant in the courtroom. His guidance and suggestions were crucial in my success on the stand. He was well balanced and poised when under pressure. All of those qualities attributed to our success at the emergency hearing.

As our case progressed, Chuck fought for my children. He fought for me. He fought for our safety and future. Nothing I can write will be able to adequately express how grateful I am for everything the Efstration Law Firm did for my family. I promise to pay it forward.

As I sit here tonight with my 3 children snuggled up next to me, I am reminded of just how differently things could have turned out.  Today, Chuck and his team helped me reach the end of this journey. Our case is over. I could not have asked for a better outcome. My children and I will wake up tomorrow and a new chapter begins. A fresh start.

I hired Chuck as my attorney as the defendant on a child support modification. This was my 4th round in court, over 14 years... 4 cases, 4 different attorneys. I can honestly say this has been my best experience in these circumstances! I have 3 key takeaways. 1) I felt heard. After 3 previous cases, I had strong opinions. Those opinions were listened to and considered. I've dealt with arrogant attorneys in the past who wouldn't have done the same, and this was my biggest appreciation for Chuck and his team. 2) Every step taken was the right step. My case wasn't the most straight forward, but Chuck handled it appropriately and efficiently. He gave knowledgeable advice and direction for me to understand the best way to move forward through each step of the process. The result was a positive outcome, I'm very pleased! 3) Plans moving forward. With 4 more years until my child turns 18, I know this isn't the last time I'll go through court. And for the first time, I know I'll be using the same attorney again. I know I can trust Chuck and his team, for their knowledge, their genuine care, and their integrity. Chuck, Brittany, Jessica.... thank you for everything!!

I was referred to the Pam McCloud Law Firm by a close friend and college classmate, who introduced me to Pam even before I ever needed a personal injury attorney. When my teenage son was struck by a telecommunications company vehicle while riding his bike, her firm was immediately the first name that came to mind.
From day one, Pam and her entire team—especially Desiree and Shenita—went above and beyond. They consistently checked in on my son throughout his treatment, showing genuine care and concern for his well-being. Pam personally kept me informed every step of the way, clearly explaining the case status and offering her expert guidance so I could make confident, informed decisions.
I was more than satisfied with the settlement outcome. Thanks to Pam’s advocacy, my son—an aspiring financial advisor—was able to use the settlement to establish an annuity that will support him during college and beyond. I am incredibly grateful for the professionalism, compassion, and results delivered by the Pam McCloud Law Firm, and I would recommend them without hesitation.

I’ve used the McCloud Lawfirm in the past and received excellent service just as before. They were able to negotiate my medical expenses down and help me get a higher payout for my accident. I’m very thankful for their team!
Thanks to the McCloud Law Firm for handling my case with compassion and professionalism. They kept me updated from the beginning until the end.
Had a great experience with The McCloud Law Firm. Will refer everyone to them!

I am overly satisfied with the services provided by The McCloud Law Firm. The only thing I regret is that I didn’t reach the first. It was McCloud Law Firm who actually got my medical bills paid and settled 5 times more than those (tv lawyers). Basically what I found out in my experience. (TV) lawyers don’t want to do the work. So if you want someone to fight in your best interest. And who has the expertise in the field. And really fight to the end. Call McCloud Law Firm. You want be disappointed.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Makayla, thank you for your feedback.

We take all reviews seriously and always strive to provide excellent service to our clients.

At this time, we are unable to locate anyone by this name in our records. Occasionally our firm is mistaken for another office with a similar name.

If you intended to leave this review for The McCloud Law Firm, we would welcome the opportunity to learn more about your experience.

Please feel free to contact our office at 678-648-0648 so we can address any concerns.

I was in a very complicated 5 car wreck in 2024. A friend of mine recommended I reach out to McCloud Law.
Due to the fact that we were dealing with 5 different insurance companies my case was a bit more complicated and took longer than I expected.
I was hurt during the accident, & had physical therapy, chiropractor, orthopedic and spine specialist visits for almost a year.
Shawn did a great job navigating me through all my dr appts, calls with insurance companies and updates regarding the case.
Unfortunately due to my injuries I missed a significant amount of work, had to let go of my second job and by the end of 2025 I was in a complete financial mess.
I reached out to Pamela McCloud and explained my situation.
Not only did she get back to me immediately she was transparent with my options.
She personally reached out to the insurance companies that were trying to low ball us and got them to agree to a significant amount more. She got the max from the other companies.
Within a weeks time she settled my case.
Got me more than I expected. Cut her fee to get me more money in my pocket and hand delivered it to me at my job so I did not have to wait or pay any fees to cash it.
To say she is a blessing is an understatement. She was truly my holiday
miracle. She made Christmas possible for my family and I. I’ve been able to pay all my debt, catch up on back payments and put money into my savings.
Thank you so much McCloud law
& a special thankyou to Pamela you are a wonderful women and a blessing .

I appreciate the grace you handled my case with.
If your in need a law firm to handle your case don’t hesitate to reach out to them.

reviews.ownerResponse: We truly appreciate you sharing your experience with us. It was our pleasure to help you through the process, and we're thrilled to hear that you felt well taken care of. We’re grateful for the opportunity to secure the best possible outcome for you and appreciate your thoughtful feedback. We look forward to helping you again, should you need us in the future!

reviews.text:
Kyle Epps knows all the ins and outs of the legal system. He served in Law Enforcement for 15 years prior to becoming a Prosecutor and then Defense Attorney! That makes him uniquely qualified in a court of law! He has been our attorney on 3 seperate occasions and has provided us with the best possible outcomes in all those situations! Although I hope to never need his services again (lol).
I highly recommend Kyle Epps and his staff for all your legal needs!!

I have worked with many attorneys throughout my career, and Attorney Epps came highly recommended to me by a trusted advisor for a personal matter. The advisor mentioned that although he doesn't talk much, he is exceptionally skilled at his job. It turns out, Kyle is not just good at what he does, he is truly great. His knowledge of the law, familiarity with the courtroom, and understanding of the legal system are impressive. What sets him apart is his extensive experience in handling similar cases. I can confidently say that Kyle is worth every penny of his retainer, and then some.
Fantastic Lawyer! Has gotten me out a pickle or two. He has also gotten friends of mine out of some sticky situations. Would highly recommend!

I honestly had to take the time to thank Attorney Epps and his staff again through an outstanding review in regards to my case and the way they handled things.. Awesome services, unmatched, I’ve never had such a great experience with a Law Firm. Kyle Epps was highly recommended and I did my research, but my own personal experience was way better than I thought.
My back was against the wall, and time was of the essence, Mr Epps and his kind and helpful staff did way above grade with my case and advocated for me and advised me even how to move going forward in my personal affairs that would also further help my situation and with handling things in my life. They actually care about their clients and the staff as a whole work well together…
I’m truly Grateful
Thanks again

HJF

I don’t even know where to start when it comes to Kyle Epps. I walked in his office 3 years ago and the charges I had called for prison time. He gave me an outline on what to do, and of course I said I’ll do this and this but not that. He pushed me hard and gave me every tool I needed to stay free.  Three years later I went to court and walked out just about a free man. Not only didn’t his way work in the courtroom, but it’s changed my life in every single way you could imagine. He was very stern, but he totally knew what he was talking about. His plan is 100%, it’s just a person has to do the footwork. He’s very professional and his team is on top of everything so you don’t slip through the crack. I am so grateful for meeting this man, I would not be the person I am today clean and sober if I didn’t walk into that office 3 years ago.
reviews.ownerResponse: I was honored to help you work your way through everything. Congratulations on beginning your life anew. Pay it forward!

Proffessional

Kyle did a great job on my daughter’s case and we are very thankful.  Things would have been much different had we not had him as our attorney.  Communicating with his office is so easy.  They have a client portal that you can log into to see appointments, documents and messages.  Elicia, his paralegal, is a pleasure to deal with as well.  Highly recommend Kyle.

Let me be very clear that there is ZERO embellishment nor exaggeration when I say that I was facing a doom I couldn't even comprehend when I contacted Kyle. I had a misdemeanor that turned into a felony through no fault of my own, other than believing a local officer when I shouldn't have.

Kyle went out of his way from the very start, before any discussion of payment even. He sat me down, reassured me, and laid out the plan exactly how it was going to work. Not one thing ever happened without Kyle or Elicia notifying me immediately.

And when I say they handled everything, I mean EVERYTHING. I spent a grand total of 20 minutes in a courtroom, and 15 of that was being there early. What I thought was going to be a year or so in jail and thousands in fines turned into 3 months in the pre-trial diversion  diversion program, 20 hours of community service.

Furthermore, his office is very up to date using a client portal that sent documents, updates, and appointments directly to my phone.

I wasted far too much time calling other lawyers, and praying I was poor enough to afford the public defender. Don't make my mistake. Skip the other lawyers, skip the panic, and go directly to contacting Kyle. He had my back from the start, and was more than worth every penny!

Kyle helped me with a Family Law matter and also with having a stolen car returned.  He exceeded my expectations at every point.  He was always available, thoughtful, knowledgeable, courteous and matter of fact.  From the beginning, I always felt he had my back. If any of my friends, family or acquaintances ever need an attorney, I will recommend Kyle.

Mr. Epps handled my case with relative ease, I feel like I got sound practical advice. I’m certain his depth of knowledge saved a substantial amount of money and shortened the process. I hope I don’t need an attorney again but if I do Kyle will be my first call.

Mr. Epps is a man of few words, but those that he uses carry some weight.    As an attorney, he was well rounded, knowledgeable, funny and reassuring.   He returned phone calls and e-mails and his flat fee system should be used by ALL criminal defense attorneys.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Kamish, you had 3 cases with us over the last 4 years and we never would force anyone to get medical treatment and you know this from your 3 cases with us. For anyone seeing this review, we always tell our clients that if you’re hurt in an accident, go seek medical care, because if you do not seek medical care, the insurance company has nothing to consider for your case. In an email to us, Kamish stated, “you said that if I do not get treatment they won’t pay for any of the treatment.” Our response to Kamish was, “EXACTLY!” In no way did we force this client to go to treatment. The attorneys have over 40+ years of experience amongst them, and we do not force our clients to do anything they do not want to do. Kamish further states to read the contract and we always advise that you should read any contract. We do not hide or mislead anyone with our contracts and to be perfectly open on the topic, our contract states exactly this, “We work on a contingency basis meaning we get paid 33% of the settlement if we can resolve your case without a lawsuit and 40% if we go to a lawsuit. IF WE DO NOT WIN, YOU DO NOT OWE US ANYTHING.” We don’t know what Kamish is referring to, but our contracts are clear and we do not need to take advantage of any clients. If Kamish was so worried about our contracts and advice, why did he hire us on 3 separate occasions! In all seriousness, not all cases are winners and we don’t think it’s fair to blame the lawyers if the case does not resolve favorably. We fight hard for our clients, whoever they may be.

Sincerely and truthfully,

Cuadra & Patel.

I am extremely dissatisfied with my experience with this law firm and with Mr. Massey’s handling of my car accident case. My case has now been ongoing for five years and is still not resolved. Communication has been poor and inconsistent throughout this time. My last in-person meeting with the firm was in May 2025, when I was assured that my case would be resolved by August 2025. That promised resolution never happened.

I later sent a follow-up email in July 2025 requesting an update, and I never received any response at all. Instead of progress, I have continued to hear excuses for delays, yet nothing meaningful seems to have been done to move my case forward. Important timelines have not been honored, and I constantly feel like I am having to chase information instead of being supported as a client.

This has been an extremely frustrating and disappointing experience. I regret trusting this firm for so long, as I believe another law office may have handled my case much more efficiently and professionally. At this point, I simply want my case completed  so I do not have to continue dealing with it going into 2026. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend this law firm or Mr. Massey for legal representation.

I called several times and sent several emails and kept getting the runaround. On 2 different occasions day of OR day before said court date something came up. The only reason I am giving a 2 star is because of Michelle who kept in contact with me throughout the whole ordeal. Needless to say I chose to go with another practice. reviews.ownerResponse:
Marcos, your case had extremely bad charges, facts, and evidence. Despite the charges, facts, and evidence, we successfully negotiated a deal saving you from a year or more in prison and multiple additional years of probation. We did our duties to protect your rights and protect you from much steeper criminal punishment. Further, the case has been discharged resulting in no conviction on your criminal history.
Immigration consequences for any criminal case should be thoroughly discussed with your retained immigration attorney. You had ample time to have your immigration attorney review your case for adverse consequences and we encouraged you to do so.
Feel free to give us a call to discuss how we can further assist you or provide guidance to help in your immigration case.

It took me a month to post this anonymously, but I felt it was important to share my experience because people going through difficult situations deserve to know when there is someone truly capable and compassionate out there to help.

I came to Mr. Hawkins during one of the most painful and complicated times in my life. I was trying to divorce my abusive ex husband and had been struggling for a long time to find an attorney who not only understood the seriousness of my circumstances, but who could also navigate the legal complications involved with my case across different states.

Before finding Mr. Hawkins, I felt overwhelmed and discouraged. I had spoken with others and kept running into roadblocks. When I finally connected with him, everything changed. From the very beginning he was straightforward, knowledgeable, and incredibly attentive. But what stood out most was that he took the time to truly listen to my story and understand the reality of what I had been going through.

Mr. Hawkins didn’t treat me like just another case. He treated me like a person whose safety, future, and peace of mind truly mattered. His professionalism, clarity, and confidence in handling the legal process gave me a sense of stability during a time when my life felt extremely uncertain.

Divorce is already difficult, but when it involves trauma and complex circumstances, you need someone who genuinely cares and knows how to fight for you the right way. Mr. Hawkins is that kind of attorney. Thanks to Mr. Hawkins experience and efficiency, my case was resolved in just a few months. That kind of progress meant more to me than I can explain.

If you are in Georgia, or in a situation where you need an attorney who understands both the legal and human side of divorce, I cannot recommend Mr. Hawkins and his firm enough. I am deeply grateful for the dedication, respect, and support I received.

There are some people in life whose work truly changes the direction of someone’s life. Mr. Hawkins is one of those people.

Love always C

Mr. Hawkins represented me last week in a magistrate court hearing, and I cannot say enough about how effective and professional he was under extreme pressure. He stepped into a situation filled with false and misleading accusations and was able to quickly dig through the noise, focus on the facts, and present my case clearly and confidently.

As a father, especially in the state of Georgia, you often feel like you have no rights while you are trying to get custody of your child. It’s a sad reality when you’re forced to fight for them. Mr. Hawkins took the time to explain to me under pressure and restricted time, the realities of legitimation and custody law to me, made sure I understood my position, and worked strategically with very limited time and resources. Because of his preparation and courtroom skill, we were able to secure a win against false claims that could have seriously affected my freedom as well as my relationship with my child.

What stood out most was his ability to stay calm, sharp, and effective while working under pressure. That’s the mark of a true advocate. I learned a great deal from him, and I’m grateful for how he showed up and delivered when it mattered most. If you’re a father navigating custody or legitimation issues and need someone who will actually fight for you, Mr. Hawkins is the attorney you want.

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi James. I'm sorry that you're unhappy, and I would love to discuss this with you, but I've never spoken to anyone with your name. We keep detailed records of every single person we talk to for conflict checking purposes. Please contact me, let me know your real name, and I'll gladly go over every detail of your situation to see what went wrong. I noticed you leave nothing but negative reviews for local businesses. I would encourage you to communicate with the businesses so that they can better understand your point of view. Lastly, I have some concern that an attorney told you honestly that he couldn't help you and you found that to be unimpressive. I am very impressed by honesty and would appreciate knowing up front, before I hire someone, that they cannot deliver on my expected result. Again, I encourage you to reach out to me. I'm happy to take you out to lunch to better understand your concerns.

My siblings and I had been searching for an estate attorney to help set up a Trust and Will for our elderly parents. When a friend recommended Hurban Law, we decided to go for a consultation. It was the best decision we’ve ever made! From the moment we met Tim, he greeted us with a warm smile. Tim’s extensive knowledge of estate planning and his ability to communicate complex concepts through diagrams and examples made it easy for us to understand.

My family and I are so grateful to Tim for his professionalism, patience, and guidance through this experience. The complete trust we have placed in his expertise is unparalleled. I strongly recommend Hurban Law, LLC to provide exceptional legal representation for your family, as they did for mine.
reviews.ownerResponse: Erika, thank you for such a heartfelt and detailed review! We're honored to have earned your trust and to have helped your family navigate such an important process. It means a lot to us that you felt supported and informed every step of the way. We’re always here to help, and we truly appreciate your recommendation.

reviews.text:
Tim has helped us with a number of estate planning issues, including setting up a living trust for us. He answered all of our questions, talked through the pros and cons of different arrangements, and guided us at every step of the way. He took care of the paperwork to transfer our real estate into the trust, updated our wills, advanced directives for healthcare, and power of attorney documents. At the end, everything came in an organized binder with instructions to us, executors, and successor trustees. He also provided digital copies of everything on a thumb drive along with the binder.

Tim was a wealth of information throughout the process and patiently answered all of our questions, explaining the ramifications of every decision we had to make.

He gave us a generous window to make changes going forward, and encouraged us to call with any question or changes, whether our situation changes or we change our mind about something.

We hope it will be a very long time before anything we planned comes to pass, but it feels great knowing there is a plan in place and that our family will never have to deal with the complexity or uncertainty of probate.

Tim’s practice is focused on providing great service to his clients. He doesn’t have the overhead of a group of partners, an extravagant office, or a large staff. Instead, he provides great legal service at a reasonable rate.

If you’ve thought about estate planning but just haven’t gotten around to it, I highly recommend you contact Tim. He’s also more than capable of helping with estate issues if you ever find yourself in the position of being in charge of the estate of a family member.

I can’t recommend Hurban Law highly enough.

Tim Hurban was fantastic to work with on our family trust. We went in feeling overwhelmed by the legal jargon and decisions, but he guided us with expertise and clarity every step of the way. He was highly responsive to our questions and made sure every detail was perfect. We left feeling confident and secure. We can't thank him enough!

My experience with the Adebimpe Jafojo law office was genuinely awful, and people—especially during times like these with difficult immigration processes—deserve to know exactly what they’re getting into before hiring this firm.

I hired this attorney to help me obtain my green card. Instead of guiding me through the process, the office repeatedly submitted paperwork with major errors: wrong names, wrong dates of birth, and other mistakes that caused months of unnecessary delays. What should have been straightforward turned into nearly a year and six months of setbacks.

The head attorney constantly had excuses—family issues, not being in the office, or simply not showing up to work. Every time I called, there was another personal problem taking priority over the job I was paying them to do. Despite paying around $10,000, I ended up leaving this firm completely, and I did not receive a single dollar back.

Once I hired a real immigration attorney—one of the best in Atlanta—I paid $22,000, and my green card arrived in less than 40 days. That alone should tell you everything.

In my opinion, this law office is unprofessional, unreliable, and absolutely not equipped to handle serious immigration cases. I regret ever trusting them with something as important as my life and future. I also believe many of the positive reviews are written by them, because my experience was the total opposite of what those reviews claim.

If I could give this firm zero stars, I would. This was a complete clown show from start to finish. Do not hire this attorney—you will regret it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Your feedback has been received. I have practiced law in the State of Georgia for nearly 30 years, and I take every client’s concern seriously; including yours. I worked diligently on your case many years ago, and we have not had any communication or attorney-client relationship for approximately seven years.
As an attorney, I am committed to providing clear communication, diligent representation, and ethical service to every individual who retains my Firm. When a case presents potential challenges or outcomes that may not align with a client’s expectations, I make certain that those possibilities are fully explained and understood.
Although you have publicly raised concerns, I will not discuss the specific details of your case due to my professional responsibility to maintain confidentiality and uphold my ethical obligations. It is important to note that the statements in your review do not reflect the actual services rendered by my Firm. I was involved in a no-fault accident in which I sustained several severe injuries.  I soon found out the other driver was immensely under-insured and an attorney would be necessary, I instinctively contacted Philip Milam for help.  Philip had recently represented my son who suffered major injuries in a no-fault vehicular accident in 2016.  Philip had served my son well and based on the injuries I suffered I was certain he was the attorney I wanted on my side.  Philips’s familiarity with personal injury cases instilled the confidence I needed and deserved.  Kudos to Philip and Stephanie for their professional and personal approach.  Thank you both.

I won’t accuse—only provide facts. This attorney will promise you the world, especially if it involves attorney malpractice. In actuality it is a bait/switch. The reality is he only wants a retainer and likely depends on it and nothing more. Even if there is a contingency he will attach a lien to some obscure part hoping you will sign and forget about it.

He assured, as others have stated, there was a proverbial slam-dunk attorney malpractice and believe me there was…he just completely tucked-tail. He actually witnessed two (2) attorneys not only lie repeatedly in Court but one also commit or possibly commit suborned perjury (attempted to coerce a witness he represented into committing perjury with false records). This attorney never called an opposing witness and literally stood and watched as a judge takes over $50K from his client without him objecting or saying a word. His client is a highly-decorated and severely disabled Combat Veteran.

Post-hearing he blames the client for “misunderstanding” the offer he made for contingency which is completely made-up and even after seeing his own email stating this he ignores it. He sends a billing invoice claiming to have racked-up a bill twice the retainer amount with names of office staff you never heard of once.

If this attorney witnessed/observes perjury or other attorney misconduct in Court as others have stated he has an ethical responsibility to report it to the State Bar and possibly to police as well depending on the severity—why would an attorney that supposedly specializes in this area of holding attorneys accountable not be suing them?

I would encourage anyone to do a deep-dive into the number of business/LLCs/Shell Companies listed under multiple names, assumed names, etc. Most if not all attach to 265 S Culver that looks like a house in a residential neighborhood with no less than four (4) law firms and about 25-30 supposed companies…including MegaChurch and Jackalope Holdings. Wish I could make this up.

There are certain games you should always avoid at the County Fair or street corner in NYC-you are never intended to win this hustle.

** Update—even before realizing we were going to be left waiting/hoping we still needed an attorney to appeal and actually thought I could convince this person to do what they contracted to do as an attorney and paid which was represent and then drop the hammer on some crooked attorneys. What we faced was an appeal for what he failed to fight for in Court. There was brief communication asking for a price to file an appeal—$3500 without hesitation from him.

When the subject was brought up about the opposing attorneys lying in Court (all transcribed) was told “that is beyond a civil matter.” Really? This is all the more reason you should be suing them like you advertised and agreed to. The appeal we filed for ZERO dollars was the Superior Court judge recognizing criminal actions meaning this attorney, again, never had any intention of suing anyone despite how egregious the other side’s behavior was and remains and then states “he wants to part ways and focus on other things.” Tread Carefully, there are snakes everywhere,

Believe the negative reviews about Atty. Ney they are all probably true as many of them mirror my experience with him. He took me for 1000$ fee on a case that was "clear malpractice" his words.... then he bailed on us when opposing atty fought back ...YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED ! This guy is a fraud !

Please take a moment to review other complaints about him online. We engaged Mr. Ney to handle a conflict of interest case. Through email, phone calls, and face-to-face meetings, he assured us that our former attorney was not entitled to any money. After providing him with $1000.00 for a case study, he returned confirming his acceptance of our case and reiterated that our ex-attorney had no claim to funds. Consequently, we ceased negotiations on a $25000 settlement with the ex-attorney. Upon receiving the remaining flat fee of $7000.00, he stopped communication. we went to his office he did not show uo. Despite assurances of a jury trial and the use of expert witnesses, none materialized – these promises proved false. Furthermore, he neglected to inform us of the hearing date, attending alone, resulting in the case being lost. As a consequence, we now find ourselves obligated to pay the ex-attorney $57000.00. Once he gets the money he is gone. I filed a complaint with Bar hoping they discipline him, then I will sue him.
I was very fortunate to find Jacob, who has been true to his word and very professional during a difficult time for me. I recommend him to my colleagues.

I would highly recommend Mr. Jacob D Rhein to anyone involved with a civil matter. He is very professional and responsive. He has his clients' best interests in mind and will fight for the best outcome in any case.

reviews.text:
Do not trust this attorney!  I paid my ex husband 172,000 that I didn’t owe.  The first attorney sold me out and let my ex commit perjury.  After being told he would turn things around and sue the first attorney, my ex was notified by my former attorney that a possible legal malpractice was pending so he took me back to court.  I am severely disabled and have advanced stage 3C cancer and lost everything due to multiple burglaries that were being done by my ex husbands former lover and some squatters that moved in on my mothers property without anyone’s permission.  This all happened in the Northeast District of Georgia.  I brought all my witnesses to court that were prepared to testify on the perjuries but William Ney didn’t call not one witness to the stand.  I adopted my son and am a private Christian school mom was first attorney did some horrible things to throw the outcome of the divorce, me and my son was in domestic violence situation and my ex kidnapped my son and took him to another state and my son is on recording telling me his dads attorney took a 9 year old child into his office and told him if he didn’t lie his dad would go to prison
This attorney wouldn’t call not one witness to the stand and he took around 20 grand and ran
Told us he had filed the legal malpractice and hadn’t done one thing then when I get in the courtroom he lets my ex commit more perjury
Knowing that my ex has gotten away with this so long he made me have to pay even more money I didn’t owe my ex who had just paid cash for lake front property and I found out my 14 year old is on probation - my worst fear became a reality-my sons therapist said the longer my son was around this man- his adoptive father that my son could take on the role of the abuser.
I could have settled the divorce in August 2016 for $20,000 now I’ve paid $172,000 due to insufficient counsel.
He wouldn’t even return a phone call.
Honest and dependable

William Ney. Was a terrible choice . He lied to me about suing.Sreve Lanier from Rome ga. That stole 80.000.00 dollars worth of equipment from me while I was in jail . On a drug charge . Ney kissed his ass an got in court an layed down on me. Didn't do any thing .   12,000.00 dollars gone .  bad choice in lawyer

Friends can give five stars but, Please take a moment to review actual case complaints about him online. We engaged Mr. William Ney to handle a conflict of interest case. Through email, phone calls, and face-to-face meetings, he assured us that our former attorney was not entitled to any money. After providing him with $1000.00 for a case study, he returned confirming his acceptance of our case and reiterated that our ex-attorney had no claim to funds. Consequently, we ceased negotiations on a $25000 settlement with the ex-attorney. Upon receiving the remaining flat fee of $7000.00, Mr. Ney stopped communication. we went to his office he did not show up. Despite assurances of a jury trial and the use of expert witnesses, none materialized – these promises proved false. Furthermore, he neglected to inform us of the hearing date, attending alone, resulting in the case being lost. As a consequence, we had to pay our ex-attorney $65000.00, while we could settle for $25000 if Mr. Ney had not convinced us that we have a winning case to just get the $8000.00.
1

I retained Mr. Bramblett in 2022 after my daughter’s initial abuse disclosures, paying him from my own savings as a stay-at-home mother. I trusted that with the evidence we had, the matter would be handled promptly. Instead, the judge directed him at our first hearing to file a motion to reconsider, but he never did. That failure, along with multiple mishandled filings and inaccurate affidavits of service, caused my case to be dismissed and forced us into years of ongoing litigation.

Because of these errors, I was left to refile, retain new counsel, and continue litigating the same issues that should have been resolved long ago. The financial burden has been devastating, I exhausted my savings, maxed out credit cards, and ultimately had to liquidate our family home and cars just to keep up with the mounting legal costs.

This was not simply a matter of strategy differences; it was a pattern of neglect and incompetence that deeply harmed my case and family. I would strongly caution anyone considering him for sensitive custody or abuse-related matters. #JusticeForMilan
